channel.title: Root-Me 10k CTF on Hexomedine
channel.description: Recent content in Root-Me 10k CTF on Hexomedine

item.title: [Root-Me 10k CTF] Web - CVE Finder Engine
item.description: The challenge In this challenge, we were tasked to retrieve the admin’s credentials. This was done by exploiting a CQL injection. Here’s the description : Write-Up Intro This is a basic application in which it is possible to look for some CVEs. Going through Burp, we can notice that two POST parameter are sent : query, which is the parameter we search for, and fields. The “fields” parameters are in fact the fields of the database the finder engine will return to us.
